prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: Her Silent Christmas Alibi
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Hallmark Possession Event
Tagline: Love lives here. So does arson.
Theme: Trust isn't given. It's rented.
Omen: a dog barking at an empty gazebo
Relationship dynamic: emotionally charged casserole exchange
Props: unopened letter, blood-adjacent tea towel, ceramic owl

Cast:
- Jenna Sutton | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.18 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family; once left town without explaining why
- Wyatt Vale | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=family practice physician | threat_aura=0.53 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=covered for someone out of shame; ignored a warning text on the worst possible night
- Daniel Bell | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=real estate agent | threat_aura=0.38 | space=annex room described as just storage | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for; once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Derek Sutton | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=therapist | threat_aura=0.7 | space=toolshed described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=inherited documents she should have burned; had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Elias Pike | archetype=decorative_husband | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=regional dentist | threat_aura=0.27 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=was in the wrong county on the wrong night
- Evelyn Marlowe | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=local podcaster | threat_aura=0.32 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts
- Wyatt Vale | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Mara Hale | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Wyatt Vale is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Jenna Sutton says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Marigold Falls.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Wyatt?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Wyatt. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Jenna. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The unopened letter is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Derek."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
